transcript: Hi, this is Jack, calling for the Denver Rocky Mountain News, how are you doin' tonight?
Well, that's good to hear! I'm doin' just fine, and, uh... thanks for asking.
Yeah, just won the local lottery here, today... feel really good.
Fifty thousand? I'll be darned! One of the girls I work with just hit a twenty-five thousand dollar. So...
Yeah, tell her to give me a holler.
[laughs] Well, I wish I could hit it. Are you, uh... currently receiving Denver Rocky Mountain News there, at your residence?
Oh, you are? Alright... just... just, Sundays, or, uh... are you gettin' the whole, everyday--
I like the... I'm looking for Woody Paige, is what I'm looking for. Sports.
Now, is he in your paper, or...?
Actually, what I'm gettin' to, is... maybe, do you wanna... get together for some scrimmage here, this weekend?
Actually, we're gonna meet on the soccer field, this weekend.
Oh, you are? And where's that...
[laughs] Yeah, uh... I used to play soccer when I was a kid. Played for...
Tell you... run... go run up a couple goals...
And we'll be at the 32nd and, uh... Navajo...
And I'll bring that Rocky Mountain News with me.
Have a look at it. How's that sound?
[laughs] Well, I can get it out to you for a penny a day.
No, I've got it, I'm sayin'. I just...
Oh, well, then... how's your service?
Well, good deal. That's good to hear, and, uh... we'll see you Sunday.
